title: Spaghetti Lovers Lite
description: A lightweight fabric-powered modpack designed for vanilla+ enjoyers to get the most out of the base game.
body: Spaghetti Lovers Lite is here! A lightweight fabric-powered modpack designed for vanilla+ enjoyers to get the most out of the base game with some QoL and vanilla-expanding mods sprinkled in. This adds many simple mods to improve your experience without changing any core gameplay.
